settings.label: Bot token
settings.description: Slack bot token used by the adapter. Store as credential material, not connection metadata.

settings.label: Team ID
settings.description: Optional Slack workspace/team ID for display and validation.

settings.label: Conversation types
settings.description: Comma-separated Slack conversation types to list and search.

settings.label: History page size
settings.description: Maximum messages fetched per conversation request.

settings.label: Slack API base URL
settings.description: Override for tests or Slack-compatible gateways.

actions.label: Validate token
actions.description: Ask the adapter to validate the current connection settings.

actions.label: Connect Slack
actions.description: Create or refresh the Slack connection using these settings.

actions.label: Create Slack app
actions.description: Open Slack's app management page to create or configure a bot token.
